entries.name: Ollama
entries.description: Run large language models locally on macOS, Linux, and Windows with a single CLI command. Ships with a REST API compatible with OpenAI's API surface for easy swapping.
entries.curator_note: The easiest way to run open models locally — one command and it just works.

entries.name: DeepSeek R2
entries.description: DeepSeek's open reasoning model. Chain-of-thought specialist with strong math, science, and code benchmarks at significantly lower cost.
entries.curator_note: Unprecedented cost/performance ratio for reasoning tasks. Critical for cost-sensitive agentic pipelines.

entries.name: Model Context Protocol (MCP)
entries.description: Anthropic's open standard for connecting AI models to external data sources and tools. Becoming the universal interface layer for agentic systems in 2026.
entries.curator_note: The USB-C of AI tooling. Framework-agnostic and rapidly becoming an industry standard.

entries.name: AutoGen 0.4
entries.description: Microsoft Research's asynchronous, event-driven multi-agent framework. Supports distributed agent networks with a pluggable model client interface.
entries.curator_note: The async event-driven architecture in 0.4 is a major leap. Best for complex multi-agent systems.

entries.name: vLLM
entries.description: High-throughput and memory-efficient LLM inference server using PagedAttention. Supports continuous batching, tensor parallelism, and an OpenAI-compatible API for production serving.
entries.curator_note: PagedAttention makes it 2-24x faster than naive serving — the default choice for GPU inference.
